{{Quote|Watch yourself out on the track, rookie. Every year we lose a couple of you first timers.|Phirk to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] before his first race|<ref name="kotor" />}}
'''Phirk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quara/Legends|Quara]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] and a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for the [[Hidden Beks]] on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] during [[3956 BBY]].

==Biography==
Phirk's track record was easily beaten by [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], who raced with a [[prototype accelerator]] that gave him an advantage over veteran [[Daggerstar|swoop racers]]. He was present when Revan was declared victor of the [[Tarisian Season Opener|competition]] and witnessed how he was betrayed. Like the other unarmed and particularly helpless racers, he fled the scene.<ref name="kotor" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
